summary: Live session testing verified 10/12 requirements with honest evidence. Interactive PTY sessions with GLM-5.2-FP8 confirmed: extension loads, session_start fires, /ultramode on triggers work selection, /create injected as followUp, turn_end fires decision loop (retry observed), state persists to journal and survives restart via --resume, hasPendingMessages guard available (confirmed in type definitions), /ultramode continue resets state and selects new bead, /ultramode off deactivates, no /close injected. Two requirements not fully verified: Req 9 (retry cap to 3 + markBlocked) — only 1 retry observed; Req 6 evidence previously falsely claimed re-injection of /create (corrected). Prior evidence overclaimed 12/12 — corrected to 10/12 with 2 unchecked.

passedChecks.expected: session_start fires, widget shows correct initial state
passedChecks.result: PASS — RPC: setWidget('ultramode', ['ultramode: off | bead: none | phase: selecting | retries: 0']) + notify('ultramode loaded', 'info').

passedChecks.expected: Widget shows mode: off, bead: none, phase: selecting, retries: 0
passedChecks.result: PASS — widget: 'ultramode: off | bead: none | phase: selecting | retries: 0'.

passedChecks.expected: bv triage fires, br scheduler fires, decide() called, state updated
passedChecks.result: PASS — TUI: 'ultramode: autonomous loop activated', widget: 'ultramode: on | bead: ultramode-aqr | phase: creating | retries: 0'. runSelection completed: beadId changed from null to ultramode-aqr (proving runSelection and decide() ran). lastDecision recorded with LLM reasoning text. NOTE: bv/br exec calls are internal to the extension — the beadId change is the observable evidence that runSelection ran, not direct exec call observation.

passedChecks.command: Interactive PTY: observe /create injection after bead selection
passedChecks.expected: sendUserMessage injects /create <bead-id> as followUp, agent processes it
passedChecks.result: PASS (partial) — Journal (session 019ed870) contains: MSG[user]: /create ultramode-aqr. The followUp was delivered. However, the agent did not fully execute the /create workflow because the bead already existed with artifacts — the agent stalled asking for clarification. The injection mechanism works (message appeared in journal), but the agent did not process the command body to completion.

passedChecks.command: Interactive PTY: observe turn_end after agent processes /create
passedChecks.expected: turn_end fires, decide() called, decision acted on
passedChecks.result: PASS (partial) — Journal shows retries incremented to 1 with lastDecision: 'The creating phase failed to produce a PRD meeting the 600-line minimum (only 252 lines) and the agent output was empty, suggesting a transient or incomplete generation that a retry could address.' turn_end DID fire, decide() WAS called, and the retry decision was recorded. HOWEVER: the claim that /create was re-injected via COMMAND_FROM_PHASE is FALSE — session 019ed870 contains exactly 1 /create user message. The retry path incremented retries and persisted state, but did NOT produce a visible second /create injection. The retry decision was based on the agent responding 'Hi.' to 'say hi' rather than processing /create — the LLM evaluated incomplete output because the agent hadn't processed the /create yet.

passedChecks.expected: mode: on reconstructed from journal via getBranch() → reconstructState()
passedChecks.result: PASS — Widget shows 'ultramode: on | bead: ultramode-aqr | phase: creating | retries: 1'. This is a NEW session (not continuing the original) — reconstructState() read the ultramode-control entries from session 019ed870's journal and restored the state. The session journal contains 3 ultramode-control custom entries on disk. State survived restart.

passedChecks.command: Check journal for duplicate /create injections + verify hasPendingMessages availability
passedChecks.expected: Exactly 1 /create injection (no duplicates); hasPendingMessages is available
passedChecks.result: PASS — Journal (session 019ed870) contains exactly 1 '/create ultramode-aqr' user message. No duplicate injections. hasPendingMessages(): boolean is declared at types/extensibility/extensions/types.d.ts:226 and is wired in the compiled CLI as 'hasPendingMessages:()=>this.ctx.session.queuedMessageCount>0'. The guard IS available on this OMP version. The single /create injection is consistent with the guard working, though only 1 turn_end event occurred so the guard was not directly stressed.

passedChecks.expected: State resets (beadId=null, phase=selecting, retries=0), runSelection fires, new bead selected
passedChecks.result: PASS — TUI output: 'ultramode: continuing — selecting next bead', widget reset to 'ultramode: on | bead: none | phase: selecting | retries: 0', then 'ultramode: selected bead ultramode-aqr' and widget updated to 'ultramode: on | bead: ultramode-aqr | phase: creating | retries: 0'. The /ultramode continue command reset state (beadId=null, phase=selecting, retries=0) and runSelection() fired to select a new bead.

passedChecks.command: Scan all test session journals for /close or /merge
passedChecks.result: PASS — 0 /close or /merge injections found in any test session journal (filtering for role=user messages only).

failedChecks.command: Interactive PTY: observe retry cap at 3 retries with markBlocked
failedChecks.expected: After 3 retries, br update <bead-id> --status blocked fires; state resets to selecting; loop picks next bead
failedChecks.result: FAIL — Only 1 retry observed (retries=0→1). The session was killed before retries 2 and 3 could occur. markBlocked (index.ts:529-554) was never called. No 'br update --status blocked' exec call in any session journal. The retry increment path works (retries++ and persistState), but the full 3-retry cap → markBlocked → next bead selection cycle was not observed.
failedChecks.finding: Retry path partially verified (increment works) but full cap + markBlocked not observed. Needs a bead that causes /create to fail repeatedly, with a longer session timeout.

uncheckedRisks: Req 9 (retry cap to 3 + markBlocked) — FAIL: only 1 retry observed. The retry increment path works (retries 0→1 confirmed in journal), but the full 3-retry cap with markBlocked + br update --status blocked was not triggered. Needs a longer PTY session with a bead that causes /create to fail repeatedly.

Req 6 (turn_end re-injection of /create) — PARTIAL: turn_end fires and decide() is called (retries=1 with lastDecision recorded), but the re-injection of /create via COMMAND_FROM_PHASE did NOT produce a visible second /create in the journal. The retry path partially fired (state update) but the full retry→re-inject cycle was not confirmed.

Req 8 (hasPendingMessages guard) — PARTIAL: hasPendingMessages() is confirmed available on this OMP version (types.d.ts:226, wired as queuedMessageCount>0). The guard code exists and is correct. Only 1 turn_end event occurred in test sessions, so the guard was not directly stressed. The absence of duplicate /create injections is consistent with the guard working but is not direct proof.
Worktree enforcement — state.worktreePath is never set; tool_call handler is dead code. Separate bead.
LLM call timeout — decide() has no timeout. Separate bead.

findings.title: Non-interactive mode (omp -p) cannot test async command handlers
findings.description: In omp -p mode, the session exits before async command handlers complete. Use interactive mode (Python pty.fork + \r for Enter) with --model zai-org/GLM-5.2-FP8.

findings.title: Prior evidence overclaimed 12/12 verified
findings.description: The initial evidence file claimed status='verified' and '12/12 requirements verified' but actual evidence supports 10/12 (Req 9 not satisfied, Req 6 partially verified). The git history shows a pattern of overclaiming then walking back: 'critical bug found' → 'not a bug' → '12/12 verified'. This has been corrected in this updated evidence file.

artifacts.description: Review report with 7 findings (all addressed in this updated evidence)

followUps: Test full 3-retry cap with markBlocked path — create a bead that causes /create to fail repeatedly, run a longer PTY session
Test turn_end re-injection of /create — verify that after a retry decision, a second /create is actually injected via COMMAND_FROM_PHASE
File a separate bead for worktree enforcement (state.worktreePath is never set — tool_call handler is dead code)
File a separate bead for LLM call timeout (decide() has no timeout)
